welcome_message:
Welcome to the Fusion Strategy Copy Trading Channel.

This automated process allows for you to copy our trades 1-1 automatically without pressing a button.

Our Fusion Bot, which will guide you through the onboarding process and help get everything set up. Click the button below and follow the steps.
checklist_intro: Please go through the document, follow the steps, and fill in the checklist below when you are done.

checklist_items.title: Go through the doc and follow the steps
Set the correct settings in your account
Deposit at least $500 in your account

confirmation_warning_message:
Have you gone through the whole document and set everything up correctly?

If you did not, this can have a negative affect on your trading experience.
success_message: You are all set up. From this point, every trade that Fusion Strategy makes will be copied on your account automatically. You can pause copy trading anytime from your platform profile. Happy trading!
